name: canshare-who-uterine-ligament-primary-histology
title: NZ WHO uterine ligament primary histology
description: Histologies used for uterine ligament primaries, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Female Genital Tumours (latest edition) - Sections 6. Tumours of the broad ligament and other uterine ligaments, 12. Neuroendocrine neoplasia, 14. Mesenchymal tumours of the lower genital tract, 15. Melanocytic lesions or an 'Other' value.
